title: dictyogramme latipes
intro: Dictyogramme latipes, also known as the hairy lip fern, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The hairy lip fern has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
